## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`

## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Handler/route bugfix includes regression test update in `tests/<service>_handlers_test.go` OR rationale provided
- [ ] Updated docs/README when behavior or workflows changed
- [ ] Included runbook query links for observability changes (`docs/observability_runbook.md`)
